name: Pulse Forge VR v0.544
short_description: Pulse Forge VR– get the highest score in your favourite music by destroying everything. Forge your own map for music destruction and have fun!
detailed_description: Pulse Forge VR – get the highest score in your favourite music by destroying everything. Forge your own map for music destruction! In this game you can use your favourite musics to create/edit your own fully playable map, where you can destroy boxes to the beat and show that you are best in your favourite music. In the future game is also going to contain its own build in musics with treasures to unlock.
about_the_game: Pulse Forge VR – get the highest score in your favourite music by destroying everything. Forge your own map for music destruction!
